overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a female NCPD officer walking through a rainy, neon-lit Night City street at night. The character moves along wet sidewalks, crosses intersections with yellow crosswalks, and passes various urban elements including digital billboards and poster-covered walls while the camera follows from a third-person perspective.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with commercial buildings and neon signage

events.description: character transitions from standing guard to walking forward along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: NCPD officer standing near a building corner with tactical rifle before walking along the wet sidewalk

entered.detail: beige concrete building with traditional grid-patterned windows
wet concrete sidewalk with green neon tint from overhead lighting
circular illuminated sign for Tom's Diner
green metal railing separating sidewalk from street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view of an NCPD officer standing on a rainy street corner. The camera orbits around the character before following as she begins walking along a green-tinted sidewalk beside a concrete building with grid windows. Neon signs illuminate the wet pavement, creating reflective surfaces.

events.description: character steps onto yellow-striped crosswalk to cross the street
yellow taxi drives past on the street while crossing

agents.ego_description: crossing the yellow-striped crosswalk and continuing along the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white tank top standing at the street corner

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing
orange cylindrical trash can on the sidewalk
elevated highway or monorail track crossing above the street

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a wide urban intersection via a yellow-striped crosswalk. A pedestrian stands at the corner while a yellow taxi passes on the wet street. The environment opens up to reveal an overpass bridge in the distance and green metal railings lining the sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial plaza with digital advertising and storefronts

events.description: approaching digital advertising kiosk in open plaza area
crossing second intersection toward teal-colored storefront

agents.ego_description: walking past a digital advertising kiosk and crossing toward a commercial storefront with vending machines

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red pants standing near the digital kiosk

entered.detail: tall illuminated digital billboard displaying advertisements
commercial building entrance with teal-colored facade and glass doors
red and black vending machine near the storefront entrance
large rectangular planter with small tree

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a commercial plaza area, passing a bright digital advertising kiosk and a pedestrian in red pants. She crosses another intersection toward a distinctive teal storefront with vending machines outside. White planter boxes and scattered debris line the green-tinted sidewalk.

events.description: entering narrower corridor with walls covered in posters and graffiti

agents.ego_description: walking along a narrow sidewalk with walls covered in posters and graffiti, holding rifle at ready

entered.detail: wall covered with layered posters and advertisements
concrete wall with colorful graffiti tags
electrical or utility boxes mounted on the wall

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character walking along a narrow, enclosed sidewalk with walls covered in layered posters and graffiti. The space feels more confined with concrete walls on one side and a metal railing on the other. The wet pavement continues to reflect the neon lights from the street as vehicles pass by in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy, neon-lit urban district that shifts from open intersections to a confined, graffiti-lined alleyway. It begins with an orbiting view of an NCPD officer on a street corner before following her along a green-tinted sidewalk where neon signs reflect off the wet pavement. As she crosses a wide intersection marked by yellow stripes, the environment opens up to reveal a passing taxi and a distant overpass bridge. The scene then expands into a commercial plaza filled with digital kiosks and teal storefronts before narrowing as the character turns toward a more enclosed path. Finally, the camera tracks her along a tight sidewalk flanked by concrete walls covered in layered posters and graffiti, with the surrounding city lights continuing to shimmer on the damp ground.
